member.name: T:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReaderState
member.summary: Specifies the state of a CborReader instance.

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReaderState.Undefined
member.summary: Indicates the undefined state.

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReaderState.UnsignedInteger
member.summary: Indicates that the next CBOR data item is an unsigned integer (major type 0).

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReaderState.NegativeInteger
member.summary: Indicates that the next CBOR data item is a negative integer (major type 1).

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReaderState.ByteString
member.summary: Indicates that the next CBOR data item is a byte string (major type 2).

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReaderState.StartIndefiniteLengthByteString
member.summary: Indicates that the next CBOR data item denotes the start of an indefinite-length byte string (major type 2).

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReaderState.EndIndefiniteLengthByteString
member.summary: Indicates that the reader is at the end of an indefinite-length byte string (major type 2).

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReaderState.TextString
member.summary: Indicates that the next CBOR data item is a UTF-8 string (major type 3).

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReaderState.StartIndefiniteLengthTextString
member.summary: Indicates that the next CBOR data item denotes the start of an indefinite-length UTF-8 text string (major type 3).

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReaderState.EndIndefiniteLengthTextString
member.summary: Indicates that the reader is at the end of an indefinite-length UTF-8 text string (major type 3).

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReaderState.StartArray
member.summary: Indicates that the next CBOR data item denotes the start of an array (major type 4).

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReaderState.EndArray
member.summary: Indicates that the reader is at the end of an array (major type 4).

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReaderState.StartMap
member.summary: Indicates that the next CBOR data item denotes the start of a map (major type 5).

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReaderState.EndMap
member.summary: Indicates that the reader is at the end of a map (major type 5).

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReaderState.Tag
member.summary: Indicates that the next CBOR data item is a semantic tag (major type 6).

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReaderState.SimpleValue
member.summary: Indicates that the next CBOR data item is a simple value (major type 7).

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReaderState.HalfPrecisionFloat
member.summary: Indicates that the next CBOR data item is an IEEE 754 Half-Precision float (major type 7).

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReaderState.SinglePrecisionFloat
member.summary: Indicates that the next CBOR data item is an IEEE 754 Single-Precision float (major type 7).

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReaderState.DoublePrecisionFloat
member.summary: Indicates that the next CBOR data item is an IEEE 754 Double-Precision float (major type 7).

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReaderState.Null
member.summary: Indicates that the next CBOR data item is a literal (major type 7).

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReaderState.Boolean
member.summary: Indicates that the next CBOR data item encodes a value (major type 7).

summary.para: Indicates that the reader has completed reading a full CBOR document.
If is set to , the reader will report this value even if the buffer contains trailing bytes.

member.name: T:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader
member.summary: A stateful, forward-only reader for Concise Binary Object Representation (CBOR) encoded data.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.PeekState
member.summary: Reads the next CBOR token, without advancing the reader.
member.returns: An object that represents the current CBOR reader state.
member.exception: The underlying data is not a well-formed CBOR encoding.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.SkipValue(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Reads the contents of the next value, discarding the result and advancing the reader.
member.param: to disable conformance mode validation for the skipped values, equivalent to using ; otherwise, .
member.exception: The reader is not at the start of new value.

exception.para: The next value has an invalid CBOR encoding.
-or-
There was an unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.
-or-
The next value uses a CBOR encoding that is not valid under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.SkipToParent(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Reads the remaining contents of the current value context, discarding results and advancing the reader to the next value in the parent context.
member.param: to disable conformance mode validation for the skipped values, equivalent to using ; otherwise, .
member.exception: The reader is at the root context

exception.para: The next value has an invalid CBOR encoding.
-or-
There was an unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.
-or-
The next value uses a CBOR encoding that is not valid under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.ReadSingle
member.summary: Reads the next data item as a single-precision floating point number (major type 7).

exception.para: The next data item does not have the correct major type.
-or-
The next simple value is not a floating-point number encoding.
-or-
The encoded value is a double-precision float.
The next value has an invalid CBOR encoding.
-or-
There was an unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.
-or-
The next value uses a CBOR encoding that is not valid under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.ReadDouble
member.summary: Reads the next data item as a double-precision floating point number (major type 7).

exception.para: The next data item does not have the correct major type.
-or-
The next simple value is not a floating-point number encoding.
The next value has an invalid CBOR encoding.
-or-
There was an unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.
-or-
The next value uses a CBOR encoding that is not valid under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.ReadBoolean
member.summary: Reads the next data item as a boolean value (major type 7).

exception.para: The next data item does not have the correct major type.
-or-
The next simple value is not a boolean encoding.
The next value has an invalid CBOR encoding.
-or-
There was an unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.
-or-
The next value uses a CBOR encoding that is not valid under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.ReadNull
member.summary: Reads the next data item as a value (major type 7).

exception.para: The next data item does not have the correct major type.
-or-
The next simple value is not a value encoding.
The next value has an invalid CBOR encoding.
-or-
There was an unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.
-or-
The next value uses a CBOR encoding that is not valid under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.ReadSimpleValue
member.summary: Reads the next data item as a CBOR simple value (major type 7).

exception.para: The next data item does not have the correct major type.
-or-
The next simple value is not a simple value encoding.
The next value has an invalid CBOR encoding.
-or-
There was an unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.
-or-
The next value uses a CBOR encoding that is not valid under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.ReadTag
member.summary: Reads the next data item as a semantic tag (major type 6).
member.exception: The next data item does not have the correct major type.

exception.para: The next value has an invalid CBOR encoding.
-or-
There was an unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.
-or-
The next value uses a CBOR encoding that is not valid under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.PeekTag
member.summary: Reads the next data item as a semantic tag (major type 6), without advancing the reader.
member.exception: The next data item does not have the correct major type.

exception.para: The next value has an invalid CBOR encoding.
-or-
There was an unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.
-or-
The next value uses a CBOR encoding that is not valid under the current conformance mode.

member.remarks: Useful in scenarios where the semantic value decoder needs to be determined at run time.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.ReadDateTimeOffset
member.summary: Reads the next data item as a tagged date/time string, as described in RFC7049 section 2.4.1.

exception.para: The next data item does not have the correct major type.
-or-
The next date item does not have the correct semantic tag.
The next value has an invalid CBOR encoding.
-or-
There was an unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.
-or-
The semantic date/time encoding is invalid.
-or-
The next value uses a CBOR encoding that is not valid under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.ReadUnixTimeSeconds
member.summary: Reads the next data item as a tagged unix time in seconds, as described in RFC7049 section 2.4.1.

exception.para: The next data item does not have the correct major type.
-or-
The next date item does not have the correct semantic tag.
The next value has an invalid CBOR encoding.
-or-
There was an unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.
-or-
The semantic date/time encoding is invalid.
-or-
The next value uses a CBOR encoding that is not valid under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.ReadBigInteger
member.summary: Reads the next data item as a tagged bignum encoding, as described in RFC7049 section 2.4.2.

exception.para: The next data item does not have the correct major type.
-or-
The next date item does not have the correct semantic tag.
The next value has an invalid CBOR encoding.
-or-
There was an unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.
-or-
The semantic bignum encoding is invalid.
-or-
The next value uses a CBOR encoding that is not valid under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.ReadDecimal
member.summary: Reads the next data item as a tagged decimal fraction encoding, as described in RFC7049 section 2.4.3.

exception.para: The next data item does not have the correct major type.
-or-
The next date item does not have the correct semantic tag.

member.exception: The decoded decimal fraction is either too large or too small for a value.

exception.para: The next value has an invalid CBOR encoding.
-or-
There was an unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.
-or-
The semantic decimal fraction encoding is invalid.
-or-
The next value uses a CBOR encoding that is not valid under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.ReadStartArray
member.summary: Reads the next data item as the start of an array (major type 4).
member.returns: The length of the definite-length array, or if the array is indefinite-length.
member.exception: The next data item does not have the correct major type.

exception.para: The next value has an invalid CBOR encoding.
-or-
There was an unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.
-or-
The next value uses a CBOR encoding that is not valid under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.ReadEndArray
member.summary: Reads the end of an array (major type 4).

exception.para: The current context is not an array.
-or-
The reader is not at the end of the array.
The next value has an invalid CBOR encoding.
-or-
There was an unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.

member.name: P:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.ConformanceMode
member.summary: Gets the conformance mode used by this reader.
member.value: One of the enumeration values that represents the conformance mode used by this reader.

member.name: P:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.AllowMultipleRootLevelValues
member.summary: Gets a value that indicates whether this reader allows multiple root-level CBOR data items.
member.value: if this reader allows multiple root-level CBOR data items; otherwise.

member.name: P:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.CurrentDepth
member.summary: Gets the reader's current level of nestedness in the CBOR document.
member.value: A number that represents the current level of nestedness in the CBOR document.

member.name: P:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.BytesRemaining
member.summary: Gets the total number of unread bytes in the buffer.
member.value: The total number of unread bytes in the buffer.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.#ctor(System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte},System.Formats.Cbor.CborConformanceMode,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a instance over the specified with the given configuration.
member.param: The CBOR-encoded data to read.
One of the enumeration values to specify a conformance mode guiding the checks performed on the encoded data. Defaults to conformance mode.
to indicate that multiple root-level values are supported by the reader; otherwise, .
member.exception: is not defined.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.ReadEncodedValue(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Reads the next CBOR data item, returning a view of the encoded value. For indefinite length encodings this includes the break byte.
member.param: to disable conformance mode validation for the read value, equivalent to using ; otherwise, .
member.returns: A view of the encoded value as a contiguous region of memory.

exception.para: The data item is not a valid CBOR data item encoding.
-or-
The CBOR encoding is not valid under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.Reset(System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte})
member.summary: Resets the instance over the specified with unchanged configuration. and are unchanged.
member.param: The CBOR-encoded data to read.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.ReadInt32
member.summary: Reads the next data item as a signed integer (major types 0,1)
member.exception: The next data item does not have the correct major type.
The encoded integer is out of range for .

exception.para: The next value has an invalid CBOR encoding.
-or-
There was an unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.
-or-
The next value uses a CBOR encoding that is not valid under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.ReadUInt32
member.summary: Reads the next data item as an unsigned integer (major type 0).
member.exception: The next data item does not have the correct major type.
The encoded integer is out of range for .

exception.para: The next value has an invalid CBOR encoding.
-or-
There was an unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.
-or-
The next value uses a CBOR encoding that is not valid under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.ReadInt64
member.summary: Reads the next data item as a signed integer (major types 0,1)
member.exception: The next data item does not have the correct major type.
The encoded integer is out of range for .

exception.para: The next value has an invalid CBOR encoding.
-or-
There was an unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.
-or-
The next value uses a CBOR encoding that is not valid under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.ReadUInt64
member.summary: Reads the next data item as an unsigned integer (major type 0).
member.exception: The next data item does not have the correct major type.
The encoded integer is out of range for .

exception.para: The next value has an invalid CBOR encoding.
-or-
There was an unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.
-or-
The next value uses a CBOR encoding that is not valid under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.ReadCborNegativeIntegerRepresentation
member.summary: Reads the next data item as a CBOR negative integer representation (major type 1).
member.returns: An unsigned integer denoting -1 minus the integer.
member.exception: The next data item does not have the correct major type.
The encoded integer is out of range for .

exception.para: The next value has an invalid CBOR encoding.
-or-
There was an unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.
-or-
The next value uses a CBOR encoding that is not valid under the current conformance mode.

member.remarks: This method supports decoding integers between -18446744073709551616 and -1. Useful for handling values that do not fit in the type.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.ReadStartMap
member.summary: Reads the next data item as the start of a map (major type 5).
member.returns: The number of key-value pairs in a definite-length map, or if the map is indefinite-length.
member.exception: The next data item does not have the correct major type.

exception.para: The next value has an invalid CBOR encoding.
-or-
There was an unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.
-or-
The next value uses a CBOR encoding that is not valid under the current conformance mode.

member.remarks: Map contents are consumed as if they were arrays twice the length of the map's declared size. For instance, a map of size 1 containing a key of type with a value of type must be consumed by successive calls to and . It is up to the caller to keep track of whether the next value is a key or a value. Fundamentally, this is a technical restriction stemming from the fact that CBOR allows keys of arbitrary type, for instance a map can contain keys that are maps themselves.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.ReadEndMap
member.summary: Reads the end of a map (major type 5).

exception.para: The current context is not a map.
-or-
The reader is not at the end of the map.
The next value has an invalid CBOR encoding.
-or-
There was an unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.
-or-
The next value uses a CBOR encoding that is not valid under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.ReadByteString
member.summary: Reads the next data item as a byte string (major type 2).
member.exception: The next date item does not have the correct major type.

exception.para: The next value has an invalid CBOR encoding.
-or-
There was an unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.
-or-
The next value uses a CBOR encoding that is not valid under the current conformance mode.

member.remarks: The method accepts indefinite length strings, which it concatenates to a single string.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.TryReadByteString(System.Span{System.Byte},System.Int32@)
member.summary: Reads the next data item as a byte string (major type 2).
member.param: The buffer in which to write the read bytes.
On success, receives the number of bytes written to .
member.returns: if had sufficient length to receive the value and the reader advances; otherwise, .
member.exception: The next data item does not have the correct major type.

exception.para: The next value has an invalid CBOR encoding.
-or-
There was an unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.
-or-
The next value uses a CBOR encoding that is not valid under the current conformance mode.

member.remarks: The method accepts indefinite length strings, which it will concatenate to a single string.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.ReadDefiniteLengthByteString
member.summary: Reads the next data item as a definite-length byte string (major type 2).
member.returns: A view of the byte string payload.

exception.para: The next data item does not have the correct major type.
-or-
The data item is an indefinite-length byte string.
The next value has an invalid CBOR encoding.
-or-
There was an unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.
-or-
The next value uses a CBOR encoding that is not valid under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.ReadStartIndefiniteLengthByteString
member.summary: Reads the next data item as the start of an indefinite-length byte string (major type 2).

exception.para: The next data item does not have the correct major type.
-or-
The next data item is a definite-length encoded string.
The next value has an invalid CBOR encoding.
-or-
There was an unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.
-or-
The next value uses a CBOR encoding that is not valid under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.ReadEndIndefiniteLengthByteString
member.summary: Ends reading an indefinite-length byte string (major type 2).

exception.para: The current context is not an indefinite-length string.
-or-
The reader is not at the end of the string.

member.exception: There was an unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.ReadTextString
member.summary: Reads the next data item as a UTF-8 text string (major type 3).
member.exception: The next data item does not have the correct major type.

exception.para: The next value has an invalid CBOR encoding.
-or-
There was an unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.
-or-
The next value uses a CBOR encoding that is not valid under the current conformance mode.

member.remarks: The method accepts indefinite length strings, which it will concatenate to a single string.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.TryReadTextString(System.Span{System.Char},System.Int32@)
member.summary: Reads the next data item as a UTF-8 text string (major type 3).
member.param: The buffer in which to write.
On success, receives the number of chars written to .
member.returns: and advances the reader if had sufficient length to receive the value, otherwise and the reader does not advance.
member.exception: The next data item does not have the correct major type.

exception.para: The next value has an invalid CBOR encoding.
-or-
There was an unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.
-or-
The next value uses a CBOR encoding that is not valid under the current conformance mode.

member.remarks: The method accepts indefinite length strings, which it will concatenate to a single string.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.ReadDefiniteLengthTextStringBytes
member.summary: Reads the next data item as a definite-length UTF-8 text string (major type 3).
member.returns: A view of the raw UTF-8 payload.

exception.para: The next data item does not have the correct major type.
-or-
The data item is an indefinite-length text string.
The next value has an invalid CBOR encoding.
-or-
There was an unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.
-or-
The next value uses a CBOR encoding that is not valid under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.ReadStartIndefiniteLengthTextString
member.summary: Reads the next data item as the start of an indefinite-length UTF-8 text string (major type 3).

exception.para: The next data item does not have the correct major type.
-or-
The next data item is a definite-length encoded string.
The next value has an invalid CBOR encoding.
-or-
There was an unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.
-or-
The next value uses a CBOR encoding that is not valid under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborReader.ReadEndIndefiniteLengthTextString
member.summary: Ends reading an indefinite-length UTF-8 text string (major type 3).

exception.para: The current context is not an indefinite-length string.
-or-
The reader is not at the end of the string.

member.exception: There was an unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.

member.name: T:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter
member.summary: A writer for Concise Binary Object Representation (CBOR) encoded data.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.WriteStartArray(System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Writes the start of a definite or indefinite-length array (major type 4).
member.param: The length of the definite-length array, or for an indefinite-length array.
member.exception: The parameter cannot be negative.

exception.para: Writing a new value exceeds the definite length of the parent data item.
-or-
The major type of the encoded value is not permitted in the parent data item.
-or-
The written data is not accepted under the current conformance mode.

member.remarks: In canonical conformance modes, the writer will reject indefinite-length writes unless the flag is enabled.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.WriteEndArray
member.summary: Writes the end of an array (major type 4).

exception.para: The written data is not accepted under the current conformance mode.
-or-
The definite-length array anticipates more data items.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.WriteStartMap(System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Writes the start of a definite or indefinite-length map (major type 5).
member.param: The length of the definite-length map, or for an indefinite-length map.
member.exception: The parameter cannot be negative.

exception.para: Writing a new value exceeds the definite length of the parent data item.
-or-
The major type of the encoded value is not permitted in the parent data item.
-or-
The written data is not accepted under the current conformance mode.

member.remarks: In canonical conformance modes, the writer will reject indefinite-length writes unless the flag is enabled. Map contents are written as if arrays twice the length of the map's declared size. For example, a map of size 1 containing a key of type with a value of type string must be written by successive calls to and . It is up to the caller to keep track of whether the next call is a key or a value. Fundamentally, this is a technical restriction stemming from the fact that CBOR allows keys of any type, for example, a map can contain keys that are maps themselves.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.WriteEndMap
member.summary: Writes the end of a map (major type 5).

exception.para: The written data is not accepted under the current conformance mode.
-or-
The definite-length map anticipates more data items.
-or-
The latest key/value pair is lacking a value.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.WriteSingle(System.Single)
member.summary: Writes a single-precision floating point number (major type 7).
member.param: The value to write.

exception.para: Writing a new value exceeds the definite length of the parent data item.
-or-
The major type of the encoded value is not permitted in the parent data item.
-or-
The written data is not accepted under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.WriteDouble(System.Double)
member.summary: Writes a double-precision floating point number (major type 7).
member.param: The value to write.

exception.para: Writing a new value exceeds the definite length of the parent data item.
-or-
The major type of the encoded value is not permitted in the parent data item.
-or-
The written data is not accepted under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.WriteBoolean(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Writes a boolean value (major type 7).
member.param: The value to write.
member.exception: Writing a new value exceeds the definite length of the parent data item. -or- The major type of the encoded value is not permitted in the parent data item. -or- The written data is not accepted under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.WriteNull
member.summary: Writes a value (major type 7).
member.exception: Writing a new value exceeds the definite length of the parent data item. -or- The major type of the encoded value is not permitted in the parent data item. -or- The written data is not accepted under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.WriteSimpleValue(System.Formats.Cbor.CborSimpleValue)
member.summary: Writes a simple value encoding (major type 7).
member.param: The value to write.
member.exception: The parameter is in the invalid 24-31 range.

Writing a new value exceeds the definite length of the parent data item. -or- The major type of the encoded value is not permitted in the parent data item. -or- The written data is not accepted under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.WriteByteString(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Writes a buffer as a byte string encoding (major type 2).
member.param: The value to write.
member.exception: The provided value cannot be .

exception.para: Writing a new value exceeds the definite length of the parent data item.
-or-
The major type of the encoded value is not permitted in the parent data item.
-or-
The written data is not accepted under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.WriteByteString(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Writes a buffer as a byte string encoding (major type 2).
member.param: The value to write.

exception.para: Writing a new value exceeds the definite length of the parent data item.
-or-
The major type of the encoded value is not permitted in the parent data item.
-or-
The written data is not accepted under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.WriteStartIndefiniteLengthByteString
member.summary: Writes the start of an indefinite-length byte string (major type 2).

exception.para: Writing a new value exceeds the definite length of the parent data item.
-or-
The major type of the encoded value is not permitted in the parent data item.
-or-
The written data is not accepted under the current conformance mode.

member.remarks: Pushes a context where definite-length chunks of the same major type can be written. In canonical conformance modes, the writer will reject indefinite-length writes unless the flag is enabled.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.WriteEndIndefiniteLengthByteString
member.summary: Writes the end of an indefinite-length byte string (major type 2).
member.exception: The written data is not accepted under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.WriteTextString(System.String)
member.summary: Writes a buffer as a UTF-8 string encoding (major type 3).
member.param: The value to write.
member.exception: The provided value cannot be .
The supplied string is not a valid UTF-8 encoding, which is not permitted under the current conformance mode.

exception.para: Writing a new value exceeds the definite length of the parent data item.
-or-
The major type of the encoded value is not permitted in the parent data item.
-or-
The written data is not accepted under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.WriteTextString(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Writes a buffer as a UTF-8 string encoding (major type 3).
member.param: The value to write.
member.exception: The supplied string is not a valid UTF-8 encoding, which is not permitted under the current conformance mode.

exception.para: Writing a new value exceeds the definite length of the parent data item.
-or-
The major type of the encoded value is not permitted in the parent data item.
-or-
The written data is not accepted under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.WriteStartIndefiniteLengthTextString
member.summary: Writes the start of an indefinite-length UTF-8 string (major type 3).

exception.para: Writing a new value exceeds the definite length of the parent data item.
-or-
The major type of the encoded value is not permitted in the parent data item.
-or-
The written data is not accepted under the current conformance mode.

member.remarks: Pushes a context where definite-length chunks of the same major type can be written. In canonical conformance modes, the writer will reject indefinite-length writes unless the flag is enabled.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.WriteEndIndefiniteLengthTextString
member.summary: Writes the end of an indefinite-length UTF-8 string (major type 3).
member.exception: The written data is not accepted under the current conformance mode.

member.name: P:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.ConformanceMode
member.summary: Gets the conformance mode used by this writer.
member.value: One of the enumeration values that represent the conformance mode used by this writer.

member.name: P:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.ConvertIndefiniteLengthEncodings
member.summary: Gets a value that indicates whether the writer automatically converts indefinite-length encodings into definite-length equivalents.
member.value: if the writer automatically converts indefinite-length encodings into definite-length equivalents; otherwise, .

member.name: P:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.AllowMultipleRootLevelValues
member.summary: Gets a value that indicates whether this writer allows multiple root-level CBOR data items.
member.value: if the writer allows multiple root-level CBOR data items; otherwise, .

member.name: P:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.CurrentDepth
member.summary: Gets the writer's current level of nestedness in the CBOR document.
member.value: A number that represents the current level of nestedness in the CBOR document.

member.name: P:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.BytesWritten
member.summary: Gets the total number of bytes that have been written to the buffer.
member.value: The total number of bytes that have been written to the buffer.

member.name: P:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.IsWriteCompleted
member.summary: Declares whether the writer has completed writing a complete root-level CBOR document, or sequence of root-level CBOR documents.
member.value: if the writer has completed writing a complete root-level CBOR document, or sequence of root-level CBOR documents; otherwise.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.#ctor(System.Formats.Cbor.CborConformanceMode,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of class using the specified configuration.
member.param: One of the enumeration values that specifies the guidance on the conformance checks performed on the encoded data. Defaults to conformance mode.

to enable automatically converting indefinite-length encodings into definite-length equivalents and allow use of indefinite-length write APIs in conformance modes that otherwise do not permit it; otherwise, .
to allow multiple root-level values to be written by the writer; otherwise, .
member.exception: is not a defined .

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.#ctor(System.Formats.Cbor.CborConformanceMode,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of class using the specified configuration.
member.param: One of the enumeration values that specifies the guidance on the conformance checks performed on the encoded data. Defaults to conformance mode.

to enable automatically converting indefinite-length encodings into definite-length equivalents and allow use of indefinite-length write APIs in conformance modes that otherwise do not permit it; otherwise, .
to allow multiple root-level values to be written by the writer; otherwise, .
The initial capacity of the underlying buffer. The value -1 can be used to use the default capacity.

exception.para: is not a defined .
-or-
is not zero, positive, or the default value indicator -1.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.Reset
member.summary: Resets the writer to have no data, without releasing resources.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.WriteEncodedValue(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Writes a single CBOR data item which has already been encoded.
member.param: The encoded value to write.

exception.para: is not a well-formed CBOR encoding.
-or-
is not valid under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.Encode
member.summary: Returns a new array containing the encoded value.
member.returns: A precisely-sized array containing the encoded value.
member.exception: The writer does not contain a complete CBOR value or sequence of root-level values.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.Encode(System.Span{System.Byte})
member.summary: Writes the encoded representation of the data to .
member.param: The buffer in which to write.
member.returns: The number of bytes written to .
member.exception: The writer does not contain a complete CBOR value or sequence of root-level values.
The destination buffer is not large enough to hold the encoded value.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.TryEncode(System.Span{System.Byte},System.Int32@)
member.summary: Attempts to write the encoded representation of the data to .
member.param: The buffer in which to write.
When this method returns, contains the number of bytes written to .
member.returns: if the encode succeeded, if is too small.
member.exception: The writer does not contain a complete CBOR value or sequence of root-level values.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.WriteInt32(System.Int32)
member.summary: Writes a value as a signed integer encoding (major types 0,1)
member.param: The value to write

exception.para: Writing a new value exceeds the definite length of the parent data item.
-or-
The major type of the encoded value is not permitted in the parent data item.
-or-
The written data is not accepted under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.WriteInt64(System.Int64)
member.summary: Writes the provided value as a signed integer encoding (major types 0,1)
member.param: The value to write

exception.para: Writing a new value exceeds the definite length of the parent data item.
-or-
The major type of the encoded value is not permitted in the parent data item.
-or-
The written data is not accepted under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.WriteUInt32(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Writes a value as an unsigned integer encoding (major type 0).
member.param: The value to write

exception.para: Writing a new value exceeds the definite length of the parent data item.
-or-
The major type of the encoded value is not permitted in the parent data item.
-or-
The written data is not accepted under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.WriteUInt64(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Writes a value as an unsigned integer encoding (major type 0).
member.param: The value to write

exception.para: Writing a new value exceeds the definite length of the parent data item.
-or-
The major type of the encoded value is not permitted in the parent data item.
-or-
The written data is not accepted under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.WriteCborNegativeIntegerRepresentation(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Writes the provided value as a CBOR negative integer representation (major type 1).
member.param: An unsigned integer denoting -1 minus the integer.

exception.para: Writing a new value exceeds the definite length of the parent data item.
-or-
The major type of the encoded value is not permitted in the parent data item.
-or-
The written data is not accepted under the current conformance mode.

member.remarks: This method supports encoding integers between -18446744073709551616 and -1. Useful for handling values that do not fit in the type.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.WriteTag(System.Formats.Cbor.CborTag)
member.summary: Assign a semantic tag (major type 6) to the next data item.
member.param: The value to write.

exception.para: Writing a new value exceeds the definite length of the parent data item.
-or-
The major type of the encoded value is not permitted in the parent data item.
-or-
The written data is not accepted under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.WriteDateTimeOffset(System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Writes the provided value as a tagged date/time string, as described in RFC7049 section 2.4.1.
member.param: The value to write.

exception.para: Writing a new value exceeds the definite length of the parent data item.
-or-
The major type of the encoded value is not permitted in the parent data item.
-or-
The written data is not accepted under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.WriteUnixTimeSeconds(System.Int64)
member.summary: Writes a unix time in seconds as a tagged date/time value, as described in RFC7049 section 2.4.1.
member.param: The value to write.

exception.para: Writing a new value exceeds the definite length of the parent data item.
-or-
The major type of the encoded value is not permitted in the parent data item.
-or-
The written data is not accepted under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.WriteUnixTimeSeconds(System.Double)
member.summary: Writes a unix time in seconds as a tagged date/time value, as described in RFC7049 section 2.4.1.
member.param: The value to write.
member.exception: The parameter cannot be infinite or NaN.

exception.para: Writing a new value exceeds the definite length of the parent data item.
-or-
The major type of the encoded value is not permitted in the parent data item.
-or-
The written data is not accepted under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.WriteBigInteger(System.Numerics.BigInteger)
member.summary: Writes the provided value as a tagged bignum encoding, as described in RFC7049 section 2.4.2.
member.param: The value to write.

exception.para: Writing a new value exceeds the definite length of the parent data item.
-or-
The major type of the encoded value is not permitted in the parent data item.
-or-
The written data is not accepted under the current conformance mode.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.WriteDecimal(System.Decimal)
member.summary: Writes the provided value value as a tagged decimal fraction encoding, as described in RFC7049 section 2.4.3
member.param: The value to write.

exception.para: Writing a new value exceeds the definite length of the parent data item.
-or-
The major type of the encoded value is not permitted in the parent data item.
-or-
The written data is not accepted under the current conformance mode.

members.member: deconstructs a decimal value into its signed integral component and negative base-10 exponent
reconstructs a decimal value out of a signed integral component and a negative base-10 exponent

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborWriter.WriteHalf(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Writes a half-precision floating point number (major type 7).
member.param: The value to write.

exception.para: Writing a new value exceeds the definite length of the parent data item.
-or-
The major type of the encoded value is not permitted in the parent data item.
-or-
The written data is not accepted under the current conformance mode.

member.name: T:System.Formats.Cbor.CborConformanceMode
member.summary: Defines supported conformance modes for encoding and decoding CBOR data.

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborConformanceMode.Lax
member.summary: Ensures that the CBOR data is well-formed, as specified in RFC7049.

summary.para: Ensures that the CBOR data adheres to strict mode, as specified in RFC7049 section 3.10.
Extends lax conformance with the following requirements:

item.description: Maps (major type 5) must not contain duplicate keys.
Simple values (major type 7) must be encoded as small a possible and exclude the reserved values 24-31.
UTF-8 string encodings must be valid.

summary.para: Ensures that the CBOR data is canonical, as specified in RFC7049 section 3.9.
Extends strict conformance with the following requirements:

item.description: Integers must be encoded as small as possible.
Maps (major type 5) must contain keys sorted by encoding.
Indefinite-length items must be made into definite-length items.

summary.para: Ensures that the CBOR data is canonical, as specified by the CTAP v2.0 standard, section 6.
Extends strict conformance with the following requirements:

item.description: Maps (major type 5) must contain keys sorted by encoding.
Indefinite-length items must be made into definite-length items.
Integers must be encoded as small as possible.
The representations of any floating-point values are not changed.
CBOR tags (major type 6) are not permitted.

member.name: T:System.Formats.Cbor.CborMajorType
member.summary: Represents CBOR Major Types, as defined in RFC7049 section 2.1.

member.name: T:System.Formats.Cbor.CborAdditionalInfo
member.summary: Represents the 5-bit additional information included in a CBOR initial byte.

member.name: T:System.Formats.Cbor.CborInitialByte
member.summary: Represents a CBOR initial byte

member.name: T:System.Formats.Cbor.CborTag
member.summary: Represents a CBOR semantic tag (major type 6).

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborTag.DateTimeString
member.summary: Tag value for RFC3339 date/time strings.

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborTag.UnixTimeSeconds
member.summary: Tag value for Epoch-based date/time strings.

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborTag.UnsignedBigNum
member.summary: Tag value for unsigned bignum encodings.

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborTag.NegativeBigNum
member.summary: Tag value for negative bignum encodings.

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborTag.DecimalFraction
member.summary: Tag value for decimal fraction encodings.

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborTag.BigFloat
member.summary: Tag value for big float encodings.

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborTag.Base64UrlLaterEncoding
member.summary: Tag value for byte strings, meant for later encoding to a base64url string representation.

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborTag.Base64StringLaterEncoding
member.summary: Tag value for byte strings, meant for later encoding to a base64 string representation.

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborTag.Base16StringLaterEncoding
member.summary: Tag value for byte strings, meant for later encoding to a base16 string representation.

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborTag.EncodedCborDataItem
member.summary: Tag value for byte strings containing embedded CBOR data item encodings.

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborTag.Uri
member.summary: Tag value for Uri strings, as defined in RFC3986.

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborTag.Base64Url
member.summary: Tag value for base64url-encoded text strings, as defined in RFC4648.

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborTag.Base64
member.summary: Tag value for base64-encoded text strings, as defined in RFC4648.

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborTag.Regex
member.summary: Tag value for regular expressions in Perl Compatible Regular Expressions / Javascript syntax.

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborTag.MimeMessage
member.summary: Tag value for MIME messages (including all headers), as defined in RFC2045.

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborTag.SelfDescribeCbor
member.summary: Tag value for the Self-Describe CBOR header (0xd9d9f7).

member.name: T:System.Formats.Cbor.CborSimpleValue
member.summary: Represents a CBOR simple value (major type 7).

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborSimpleValue.False
member.summary: Represents the value 'false'.

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborSimpleValue.True
member.summary: Represents the value 'true'.

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborSimpleValue.Null
member.summary: Represents the value 'null'.

member.name: F:System.Formats.Cbor.CborSimpleValue.Undefined
member.summary: Represents an undefined value, to be used by an encoder as a substitute for a data item with an encoding problem.

member.name: T:System.Formats.Cbor.CborContentException
member.summary: The exception that's thrown when CBOR data is invalid.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborContentException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class using the provided message.
member.param: The error message that explains the reason for the exception.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborContentException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class, using the provided message and exception that is the cause of this exception.
member.param: The error message that explains the reason for the exception.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception.

member.name: M:System.Formats.Cbor.CborContentException.#ctor(System.Runtime.Serialization.SerializationInfo,System.Runtime.Serialization.StreamingContext)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with serialized data.
member.param: The object that holds the serialized object data.
The contextual information about the source or destination.

member.name: P:System.SR.Argument_EncodeDestinationTooSmall
member.summary: The destination is too small to hold the encoded value.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_PopMajorTypeMismatch
member.summary: Cannot perform the requested operation, the current major type context is '{0}'.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_NotAtEndOfDefiniteLengthDataItem
member.summary: Not at end of the definite-length data item.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_NotAtEndOfIndefiniteLengthDataItem
member.summary: Not at end of the indefinite-length data item.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_ConformanceMode_IndefiniteLengthItemsNotSupported
member.summary: CBOR Conformance mode '{0}' does not support indefinite-length data items.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_ConformanceMode_NonCanonicalIntegerRepresentation
member.summary: CBOR Conformance mode '{0}' does not support non-canonical integer representations.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_ConformanceMode_RequiresDefiniteLengthItems
member.summary: CBOR Conformance mode '{0}' does not support indefinite-length items.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_ConformanceMode_ContainsDuplicateKeys
member.summary: CBOR Conformance mode '{0}' does not support duplicate keys.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_ConformanceMode_KeysNotInSortedOrder
member.summary: CBOR keys not sorted in accordance with conformance mode '{0}'.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_ConformanceMode_TagsNotSupported
member.summary: CBOR Conformance mode '{0}' does not support tagged values.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_Reader_DefiniteLengthExceedsBufferSize
member.summary: Declared definite length of CBOR data item exceeds available buffer size.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_Reader_NoMoreDataItemsToRead
member.summary: No more CBOR data items to read in the current context.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_Reader_InvalidCbor_UnexpectedEndOfBuffer
member.summary: Unexpected end of CBOR encoding data.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_Reader_InvalidCbor_IndefiniteLengthStringContainsInvalidDataItem
member.summary: Indefinite-length CBOR string nests an invalid data item of major type {0}.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_Reader_MajorTypeMismatch
member.summary: Cannot perform the requested operation, the next CBOR data item is of major type '{0}'.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_Reader_IsAtRootContext
member.summary: CBOR reader is already at the root data item context.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_Reader_InvalidCbor_TagNotFollowedByValue
member.summary: A CBOR tag should always be followed by a data item.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_Reader_InvalidCbor_InvalidIntegerEncoding
member.summary: CBOR initial byte contains invalid integer encoding

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_Reader_InvalidCbor_KeyMissingValue
member.summary: The current CBOR map contains an incomplete key/value pair.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_Reader_NotAFloatEncoding
member.summary: Data item does not encode a floating point number.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_Reader_ReadingAsLowerPrecision
member.summary: Attempting to read floating point encoding as a lower-precision value.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_Reader_NotABooleanEncoding
member.summary: CBOR simple value does not encode a boolean value.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_Reader_NotASimpleValueEncoding
member.summary: CBOR data item does not encode a simple value.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_Reader_NotANullEncoding
member.summary: CBOR simple value does not encode null.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_ConformanceMode_InvalidSimpleValueEncoding
member.summary: CBOR Conformance mode '{0}' does not support simple values in the range 24-31 and must be encoded as small as possible.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_Reader_InvalidCbor_UnexpectedBreakByte
member.summary: CBOR definite-length data items contains unexpected break byte.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_Reader_Skip_InvalidState
member.summary: Reader state '{0}' is not at the start of a data item.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_Reader_InvalidCbor_InvalidUtf8StringEncoding
member.summary: CBOR text string payload is not valid a UTF-8 encoding.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_Reader_NotIndefiniteLengthString
member.summary: CBOR string is not of indefinite length.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_Reader_TagMismatch
member.summary: CBOR tag does not match expected value.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_Reader_InvalidDateTimeEncoding
member.summary: Not a valid tagged RFC3339 DateTime encoding.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_Reader_InvalidUnixTimeEncoding
member.summary: Not a valid tagged unix time encoding.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_Reader_InvalidBigNumEncoding
member.summary: Not a valid tagged bignum encoding.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_Reader_InvalidDecimalEncoding
member.summary: Not a valid tagged decimal encoding.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_Writer_PayloadIsNotValidCbor
member.summary: Not a valid CBOR value encoding.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_Writer_IncompleteCborDocument
member.summary: Writer contains an incomplete CBOR document.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_Writer_DefiniteLengthExceeded
member.summary: Adding a CBOR data item to the current context exceeds its definite length.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_Writer_CannotNestDataItemsInIndefiniteLengthStrings
member.summary: Cannot nest data items in indefinite-length CBOR string contexts.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_Writer_MapIncompleteKeyValuePair
member.summary: CBOR map incomplete; each key must be followed by a corresponding value.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_Writer_InvalidUtf8String
member.summary: Not a valid UTF-8 encoding.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_Writer_ValueCannotBeInfiniteOrNaN
member.summary: Value cannot be infinite or NaN.

member.name: P:System.SR.Cbor_Writer_DecimalOverflow
member.summary: Value was either too large or too small for a Decimal.

member.name: P:System.SR.CborContentException_DefaultMessage
member.summary: The CBOR encoding is invalid.

member.name: T:System.Runtime.InteropServices.LibraryImportAttribute
member.summary: Attribute used to indicate a source generator should create a function for marshalling arguments instead of relying on the runtime to generate an equivalent marshalling function at run-time.
member.remarks: This attribute is meaningless if the source generator associated with it is not enabled. The current built-in source generator only supports C# and only supplies an implementation when applied to static, partial, non-generic methods.

member.name: M:System.Runtime.InteropServices.LibraryImportAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the .
member.param: Name of the library containing the import.

member.name: P:System.Runtime.InteropServices.LibraryImportAttribute.LibraryName
member.summary: Gets the name of the library containing the import.

member.name: P:System.Runtime.InteropServices.LibraryImportAttribute.EntryPoint
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the entry point to be called.

member.name: P:System.Runtime.InteropServices.LibraryImportAttribute.StringMarshalling
member.summary: Gets or sets how to marshal string arguments to the method.
member.remarks: If this field is set to a value other than , must not be specified.

member.name: P:System.Runtime.InteropServices.LibraryImportAttribute.StringMarshallingCustomType
member.summary: Gets or sets the used to control how string arguments to the method are marshalled.
member.remarks: If this field is specified, must not be specified or must be set to .

member.name: P:System.Runtime.InteropServices.LibraryImportAttribute.SetLastError
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the callee sets an error (SetLastError on Windows or errno on other platforms) before returning from the attributed method.

member.name: T:System.Runtime.InteropServices.StringMarshalling
member.summary: Specifies how strings should be marshalled for generated p/invokes

member.name: F:System.Runtime.InteropServices.StringMarshalling.Custom
member.summary: Indicates the user is supplying a specific marshaller in .

member.name: F:System.Runtime.InteropServices.StringMarshalling.Utf8
member.summary: Use the platform-provided UTF-8 marshaller.

member.name: F:System.Runtime.InteropServices.StringMarshalling.Utf16
member.summary: Use the platform-provided UTF-16 marshaller.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.AllowNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that null is allowed as an input even if the corresponding type disallows it.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DisallowNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that null is disallowed as an input even if the corresponding type allows it.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that an output may be null even if the corresponding type disallows it.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that an output will not be null even if the corresponding type allows it. Specifies that an input argument was not null when the call returns.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullWhenAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that when a method returns , the parameter may be null even if the corresponding type disallows it.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullWhenAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified return value condition.
member.param: The return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated parameter may be null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullWhenAttribute.ReturnValue
member.summary: Gets the return value condition.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullWhenAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that when a method returns , the parameter will not be null even if the corresponding type allows it.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullWhenAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified return value condition.
member.param: The return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated parameter will not be null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullWhenAttribute.ReturnValue
member.summary: Gets the return value condition.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullIfNotNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that the output will be non-null if the named parameter is non-null.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullIfNotNullAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the associated parameter name.
member.param: The associated parameter name. The output will be non-null if the argument to the parameter specified is non-null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullIfNotNullAttribute.ParameterName
member.summary: Gets the associated parameter name.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnAttribute
member.summary: Applied to a method that will never return under any circumstance.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnIfAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that the method will not return if the associated Boolean parameter is passed the specified value.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnIfAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified parameter value.
member.param: The condition parameter value. Code after the method will be considered unreachable by diagnostics if the argument to the associated parameter matches this value.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnIfAttribute.ParameterValue
member.summary: Gets the condition parameter value.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that the method or property will ensure that the listed field and property members have not-null values.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with a field or property member.
member.param: The field or property member that is promised to be not-null.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullAttribute.#ctor(System.String[])
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the list of field and property members.
member.param: The list of field and property members that are promised to be not-null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullAttribute.Members
member.summary: Gets field or property member names.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that the method or property will ensure that the listed field and property members have not-null values when returning with the specified return value condition.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified return value condition and a field or property member.
member.param: The return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated field or property member will not be null.
The field or property member that is promised to be not-null.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.String[])
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified return value condition and list of field and property members.
member.param: The return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated field and property members will not be null.
The list of field and property members that are promised to be not-null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute.ReturnValue
member.summary: Gets the return value condition.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute.Members
member.summary: Gets field or property member names.
